title: coreopsis rudis
intro: Coreopsis rudis, also known as Roughflower Coreopsis, is a perennial wildflower native to North America, characterized by its unique, fuzzy appearance and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coreopsis rudis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support skin health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Coreopsis rudis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
